pages.text:
STATEMENT OF INTENT TO PURSUE A MEMORANDUM OF

UNDERSTANDING CONCERNING THE DEVELOPMENT AND

IMPLEMENTATION OF STRATEGIC INFRASTRUCTURE PRIORITY

PROJECTS IN KENYA

On the occasion of the State visit of President Emmanuel Macron to Kenya (13th and 14th of March 2019), and in order to illustrate and give commitment to pursue a Memorandum of Understanding on the development and implementation of strategic infrastructure priority projects in Kenya.

The undersigned, representing the Government of the Republic of Kenya and the

Government of the French Republic (the Parties) hereby:

1. Recognize the close and fraternal relations between the two countries;

2. Recall the importance of mutually beneficial cooperation in the various fields;

3. Determined to further strengthen and expand their cooperation;

4. Convinced that cooperation in the field of Strategic Infrastructural Projects will be to their mutual advantage.

5. Confirm that they will work together to pursue a Memorandum of Understanding on the Development and Implementation of Strategic Infrastructure Priority Projects in

Kenya.

Signed in Nairobi this.

13 th

FOR THE GOVERNMENT OF THE

FRENCH REPUBLIC

Mubri

Mr. Jean -Yves LE DRIAN

Minister for Europe and Foreign Affairs

....Day of

March

.2019

FOR THE GOVERNMENT OF THE

REPUBLIC OF KENYA

Amb. Monica K. Juma. Dphil, CBS

Cabinet Secretary for Foreign Affairs
